mapper.sql: id, gear_id, sn_code, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM gear_item WHERE gear_id = #{gearId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE gear_item SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE gear_item SET status = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 2
UPDATE gear_item SET status = 3 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 2
UPDATE gear_item SET status = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 3
UPDATE gear_item SET status = 4 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 3
